creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The very same happens on FreeBSD 12-CURRENT ( 12.0-CURRENT #69 r319758: Fri Jun  9 22:22:31 CEST 2017 amd64) with poudriere (poudriere revision most recent, jail is the very revision same as the host itself:

building for: FreeBSD pkg.walstatt.dynvpn.de 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT 1200032 amd64
maintained by: hrs@FreeBSD.org
Makefile ident:      $FreeBSD: head/security/heimdal/Makefile 443016 2017-06-09 15:57:30Z feld $
Poudriere version: 3.1.19
Host OSVERSION: 1200032
Jail OSVERSION: 1200032
).
